name: llm-guided-sat
description: LLM-Guided DPLL SAT Solver — SAT Competition 2026 Experimental Track

scripts.build: esbuild src/sat.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=esm --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" --outfile=dist/sat.mjs
scripts.package: npm run benchmarks:generate && npm run build && zip -r llm-guided-sat-starexec.zip bin/ dist/ benchmarks/ SYSTEM_DESCRIPTION.md README.md && echo 'Package ready: llm-guided-sat-starexec.zip'
